mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interaction_event (topic_id, user_id, interaction_type, device_fingerprint, ip_address, weight_multiplier) VALUES (#{topicId}, #{userId}, #{interactionType}, #{deviceFingerprint}, #{ipAddress}, #{weightMultiplier})

INSERT INTO interaction_event (topic_id, user_id, interaction_type, device_fingerprint, ip_address, weight_multiplier) VALUES
(#{item.topicId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.interactionType}, #{item.deviceFingerprint}, #{item.ipAddress}, #{item.weightMultiplier})
mapper.select: SELECT topic_id, interaction_type, COUNT(*) AS total_count FROM interaction_event GROUP BY topic_id, interaction_type
